holdings.infoBox: XLF is an equity ETF with a total of 80 individual holdings. The top holdings are Berkshire Hathaway stock at 11.70%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 11.67%, Visa Inc. at 7.21%, Mastercard at 5.21%, and Bank of America at 4.87%.

overview.description: The State Street Financial Select Sector SPDR ETF (XLF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Financial Select Sector index. The fund tracks an index of S&P 500 financial stocks, weighted by market cap. XLF was launched on Dec 16, 1998 and is issued by State Street.
